raw.message: Dressing Up: Engage & Play with Our Fashion Games

hook.summary: A character walks into a 'Sparkle Changing Room' and is instantly transformed into a high-fashion avatar.
hook.visual_action: A 2D animated character walks across the screen and enters a purple curtained changing room.

scene_flow: Character enters the changing room and reveals a pink Y2K-inspired outfit with Hello Kitty boots.
Fast-paced montage of the in-game customization menu selecting hair, clothes, and accessories.
Final reveal of a glamorous blonde character with a pink fur coat and a small dog.
Showcase of a third character in baggy jeans and a street-style look.
End screen with a 'PLAY' button and app store icons.
audience_proxy: Young girls and teenagers who enjoy fashion, character customization, and aesthetic dress-up games.
